import { useState } from "react"; import { recipes } from "../../data/index"; const NAV = [ { icon: "🏠", label: "Home", id: "home-nav" }, { icon: "🍴", label: "Saved Recipes", id: "saved", active: true }, { icon: "👨‍🍳", label: "Following", id: "following" }, { icon: "❤", label: "Favorites", id: "favorites" }, { icon: "🛒", label: "Shopping List", id: "shopping" }, ]; export default function UserDashboardPage({ setPage, setSelectedRecipe }) { const [activeNav, setActiveNav] = useState("saved"); const [search, setSearch] = useState(""); const saved = recipes.filter(r => r.status === "Live"); return (
